Notes: Returns fixed value 32'h0001_0000
Returns fixed value 32'h2026_0403
Software default writes 0. Combined bank swizzle default [2:0]=3'b110.
Software default writes 1. Combined bank swizzle default [2:0]=3'b110.
Software default writes 1. Combined bank swizzle default [2:0]=3'b110.
Software default writes 1.

Only applies to RGBA8888 metadata/tile address path. 0=normal RGBA/lossless layout, 1=RGBA8888 lossy 2:1 layout. When 1, decoder halves the effective tile_y for address calculation, adds a 128-byte offset for odd tile_y, disables bank spread for this path, and treats 256-byte metadata payload as 128 bytes.

Tile surface pitch in 16-byte units. Program tile_cfg_pitch=align_up(width*bpp, tile_w*4*bpp)/16. bpp: RGBA8888/RGBA1010102=4, YUV420_8=1, YUV420_10=2. tile_w: RGBA=16, YUV=32. RTL uses tile_cfg_pitch<<4 as byte pitch. Example NV12 1996x1074: align_up(1996*1,32*4*1)=2048 bytes, tile_cfg_pitch=2048/16=128.
0=linear data, 1=tiled data. Software default writes 1.
Reserved. Software should write 0.
Software writes 1 for lossy format and 0 for lossless format.
Reserved. Software should write 0.
Defaults to 1 after reset
Can be used to independently clear VIVO internal state
Writing 1 toggles the start toggle and generates frame_start_pulse_axi in the AXI domain; readback is fixed to 0; recommended as the final write
Usually issued with start in the same write

Description: Low 32 bits of the RGBA or Y metadata base address
Notes: For contiguous UBWC buffer, program Y/RGBA metadata start address. Metadata size formula: meta_pitch=align_up(ceil(plane_width/tile_w),64); meta_size=align_up(meta_pitch*align_up(ceil(plane_height/tile_h),16),4KB). Example NV12 1996x1074 base=0xA00000: Y meta_base=0xA00000, Y meta_pitch=64, Y meta_size=0x3000.

Description: High 32 bits of the RGBA or Y metadata base address
Notes: Forms the full 64-bit address when AXI_AW=64

Description: Low 32 bits of the UV metadata base address
Notes: For YUV formats, program UV metadata start address. Example NV12 1996x1074 contiguous layout: meta_base_uv = tile_base_y + Y_pixel_size = 0xA03000 + 0x220000 = 0xC23000; UV meta_pitch=64, UV meta_size=0x2000.

Description: High 32 bits of the UV metadata base address
Notes: Forms the full 64-bit address when AXI_AW=64

Description: Metadata tile count in the horizontal direction
Notes: Shared by Y/RGBA and UV metadata scan. ceil(a/b) means round up division. Program round_up(width/tile_w): RGBA tile_w=16, YUV tile_w=32. Example 1996x1074: RGBA8888/RGBA1010102 => round_up(1996/16)=125; YUV420_8/YUV420_10 => round_up(1996/32)=63.

Description: Metadata tile count in the vertical direction
Notes: Program Y/RGBA tile rows as round_up(height/tile_h): RGBA tile_h=4, YUV tile_h=8. For YUV420, UV metadata rows are derived internally as round_up(meta_tile_y_numbers/2). Example 1996x1074: RGBA8888/RGBA1010102 => round_up(1074/4)=269; YUV420_8/YUV420_10 => round_up(1074/8)=135; YUV420 internal UV rows=round_up(135/2)=68.

Description: Valid output image width in pixels
Notes: Program active image width in pixels. Used to limit line unpacking: RGBA words=ceil(width/4), YUV420_8/NV12 words=ceil(width/16), YUV420_10/P010 words=ceil(width/8).
Frame-level output format. Codes: 0=RGBA8888, 1=RGBA1010102, 2=YUV420_8/NV12, 3=YUV420_10/P010.
Horizontal total in pixels. RTL converts to OTF beats with ceil(h_total/4). Must cover h_sync + h_bp + h_act.
Horizontal sync width in pixels. RTL converts to OTF beats with ceil(h_sync/4).
Horizontal back porch in pixels. RTL converts to OTF beats with ceil(h_bp/4). Active window starts after h_sync + h_bp.
Horizontal active width in pixels. Usually program the visible output width; should match otf_cfg_img_width unless blanking/active width is intentionally different.
Vertical total in lines. Must cover v_sync + v_bp + v_act.
Vertical sync width in lines.
Vertical back porch in lines. Active window starts after v_sync + v_bp.
Vertical active height in lines. Program the visible output height.

Description: Low 32 bits of the RGBA or UV tile base address
Notes: For RGBA, program RGBA pixel/tile data start. For YUV, program UV pixel/tile data start. Example NV12 1996x1074 contiguous layout: UV tile_base = meta_base_uv + UV_meta_size = 0xC23000 + 0x2000 = 0xC25000. UV pixel size example: align_up(2*align_up(998,64)*align_up(537,32),4KB)=0x110000.

Description: High 32 bits of the RGBA or UV tile base address
Notes: Forms the full 64-bit address when AXI_AW=64

Description: Low 32 bits of the Y tile base address
Notes: For YUV formats, program Y pixel/tile data start. Pixel size formula: pixel_pitch=align_up(width*bpp,tile_w*4*bpp); aligned_height=align_up(height,32); pixel_size=align_up(pixel_pitch*aligned_height,4KB). Example NV12 1996x1074: Y tile_base = Y_meta_base + Y_meta_size = 0xA00000 + 0x3000 = 0xA03000; Y pixel_pitch=2048, aligned_height=1088, Y_pixel_size=0x220000.

Description: High 32 bits of the Y tile base address
Notes: Forms the full 64-bit address when AXI_AW=64
